title: Perfecting Breasts! \ Dream Job \ Panty Wars \ Mihari Otosuna's Day Off
overview: Aito, a lowly manga artist, continually says and does things that make his assistant, Sahoto, uncomfortable in every way imaginable.

title: A New Assistant Arrives \ That's Important \ First Time Together
overview: A new girl shows up to assist Yuuki, but there may be a problem with her. Later, Yuuki's editor tries to persuade him to alter his manga to rise in the rankings.

title: Porno Mag Panic \ Can I Take Care of Her? \ Dark Comet Appears!
overview: Yuuki's porno stash is found and the models look awfully similar to Sahoto. Later, after Yuuki's hamfisted attemps to take care of Sahoto, a cute temporary assistant is hired.

title: S & M \ Mascot Character \ Seventeen Mihari
overview: Yuuki angers Sena who takes her vengeance upon him, the group creates a new mascot that Sahoto falls in love with, and Mihari recounts the first time she met Yuuki.

title: Park Shock \ Someday \ Using Close Friends for Reference
overview: Yuuki meets an unusual fan in the park, Sahoto dreams of being a professional, and our favorite mangaka uses his friends as drawing references.

title: Let's Go to a Hot Spring
overview: Yuuki decides to spend his royalty check on the girls, inviting them to a relaxing vacation to the hot springs. But as it always is with Yuuki, he has ulterior motives.

title: Little Sister Attacks! \ A Night Together \ Piggybacking the Super Assistant
overview: Sahoto's little sister visits, Yuuki's editor decides to spend the night, and the littlest super assistant lets Yuuki into her circle of trust.

title: Chief Editor's Check \ In the Mind of a Girl \ Going Too Far
overview: The chief editor comes to check progress, Yuuki's dream of becoming the little girl (almost) comes true, and Mihari threatens to reassign Yuuki to another editor.

title: Mistakes of the Past
overview: Hindsight is always 20/20! Mihari contemplates the small mistakes that she may have made in her youth.

title: Sena-chan's Crisis \ I'll Cheer You On! \ Rain Talk
overview: Girls in bunny suits, long walks in the rain, and elevator problems are all in a day's work for Yuuki and his lovely assistants!

title: Dreaded Change \ Do your best, Sena-chan! \ Know Yourself
overview: Mihari's altered appearance is incredibly distressing to Yuuki. Cat sitting becomes a bit of an adventure for Sena and Yuuki.

title: Progress \ End of Summer \ Panty Personality Test
overview: Sahoto hopes to make her debut with a new author award. The end of the summer has the group analyzing their true nature through particular clothing choices.
